findings.title: 2 JavaScript console error(s) detected
findings.description: The browser console reported 2 error(s). First error: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 401 (Unauthorized)
findings.fix_prompt: Open your browser DevTools console and fix all JavaScript errors. There are 2 errors to resolve.

findings.title: 1 form(s) detected — verify labels
findings.description: Found 1 form(s) on the page. Ensure all form inputs have associated <label> elements for accessibility.
findings.fix_prompt: Review all form inputs and ensure each one has an associated <label>. Use the 'for' attribute matching the input's 'id'.

summary: Basic technical audit completed (AI analysis was unavailable). Found 2 issue(s) from automated checks.
bundled_fix_prompt:
I ran a reliability audit on https://www.saucedemo.com and found the following issues.
Please fix all of them:

1. [HIGH] 2 JavaScript console error(s) detected
   Fix: Open your browser DevTools console and fix all JavaScript errors. There are 2 errors to resolve.

2. [LOW] 1 form(s) detected — verify labels
   Fix: Review all form inputs and ensure each one has an associated <label>. Use the 'for' attribute matching the input's 'id'.

After fixing all issues, make sure the site works correctly on both desktop (1280px) and mobile (390px) viewports.
